faq.question: How can I book an appointment?
faq.answer: You can fill the appointment form and our team will contact you.

faq.question: What are the consultation charges?
faq.answer: Consultation charges start from ₹250 depending on the doctor.

faq.question: Can I select my doctor?
faq.answer: Yes, you can choose your preferred doctor from the dropdown list.
